p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 5 CI/CD pass_to_pass tests: test_tsconfig_valid (validates tsconfig.json files), test_package_json_valid (validates package.json files), test_eslint_config_valid (validates eslint configs exist), test_modified_files_typescript_syntax (syntax validation for modified files), test_ecommerce_build_config (validates next.config.js and tailwind.config.mjs). Repo uses pnpm with turbo for builds. CI commands found: pnpm lint, pnpm build:plugin-ecommerce, pnpm typecheck. Tests added as static validation since dependencies are not installed in the Docker image.
